tools.name: list_sleepwalker_tests
tools.title: List Sleepwalker tests
tools.description: List saved Content Intelligence and AI Visibility tests for the authenticated account.

tools.name: get_sleepwalker_test_results
tools.title: Get Sleepwalker test results
tools.description: Read compact latest run history for a known saved test.

tools.name: get_sleepwalker_reports_by_url
tools.title: Get Sleepwalker reports by URL
tools.description: Find recent owned reports for a URL across supported Sleepwalker workflows.

tools.name: get_sleepwalker_run_result
tools.title: Get Sleepwalker run result
tools.description: Fetch one full structured Content Intelligence or AI Visibility run.

tools.name: get_sleepwalker_prompt_response
tools.title: Get Sleepwalker prompt response
tools.description: Fetch one capped AI Visibility prompt response and optional citations.

tools.name: get_sleepwalker_summaries
tools.title: Get Sleepwalker summaries
tools.description: Read compact run summaries before drilling into full results.

tools.name: get_sleepwalker_consistent_recommendations
tools.title: Get Sleepwalker consistent recommendations
tools.description: Find recurring Content Intelligence recommendations across recent runs.

tools.name: list_sleepwalker_visibility_runs
tools.title: List Sleepwalker visibility runs
tools.description: List saved AI Visibility runs for the authenticated account.

tools.name: get_sleepwalker_visibility_run_status
tools.title: Get Sleepwalker visibility run status
tools.description: Read AI Visibility run status, summary, and results when available.

tools.name: list_sleepwalker_content_runs
tools.title: List Sleepwalker Content Intelligence runs
tools.description: List saved Content Intelligence runs for the authenticated account.

tools.name: get_sleepwalker_content_run_status
tools.title: Get Sleepwalker Content Intelligence run status
tools.description: Read Content Intelligence run status and result when available.

tools.name: serialize_sleepwalker_page_content
tools.title: Serialize Sleepwalker page content
tools.description: Extract one URL into normalized page content for agents and workflows.
tools.credit_behavior: Uses prepaid credits when billable content is returned.

tools.name: suggest_sleepwalker_visibility_prompts
tools.title: Suggest Sleepwalker visibility prompts
tools.description: Generate AI Visibility prompt ideas for a URL and target entity.
tools.credit_behavior: Uses prepaid credits when suggestions are returned.

tools.name: create_sleepwalker_visibility_run
tools.title: Create Sleepwalker visibility run
tools.description: Queue a saved AI Visibility run from prompts and platforms or explicit probes.
tools.credit_behavior: Uses prepaid credits per queued probe.

tools.name: discover_sleepwalker_content_trends
tools.title: Discover Sleepwalker content trends
tools.description: Find relevant content and market trends for one URL.
tools.credit_behavior: Uses prepaid credits when trends are returned.

tools.name: score_sleepwalker_content
tools.title: Score Sleepwalker content
tools.description: Score a page and return prioritized Content Intelligence recommendations.
tools.credit_behavior: Uses prepaid credits when scoring completes.

tools.name: create_sleepwalker_content_run
tools.title: Create Sleepwalker Content Intelligence run
tools.description: Queue a saved Content Intelligence run for one URL.
tools.credit_behavior: Uses prepaid credits based on analysis depth.
